fields.inlineHelpText: Enter the ID of your activated Pre-Work Brief prompt template. To find your ID, open the template in Prompt Builder and copy the characters after "EinsteinPromptStudio/" from the URL. For example, in this URL:  https://testcom98.test1.my.pc-rnd.salesforce-setup.com/lightning/setup/EinsteinPromptStudio/0hfSG000001SUFVYA4/edit?c__versionId=3vNSG0000000g8v2AA, the ID is 0hfSG000001SUFVYA4.
fields.label: Pre-Work Brief Prompt Template ID
fields.name: PreWorkBriefPromptTemplate

fields.inlineHelpText: Enter a summary manually. Or if you’re using Agentforce, your AI agent can fill in the summary for you.
